subcodes.title: Public address given on 1912-06-16
subcodes.first_line: This is a goodly temple and congregation, for -- praise be to God! -- this is a house of worship
subcodes.subjects: @unity; oneness of humanity, @literal interpretation, @Muhammad; Islam, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @oneness; unity of religion, @universal peace; world unity, @suffering; rejection of Christ
